zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar於1185年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，他的父親Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar33歲，母親Ada of Scotland21歲。他和Countess Euphemia Stewart至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1235年登記服兵役。他去世於1248年12月13日之前在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar于1185年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，他的父亲Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar33岁，母亲Ada of Scotland21岁。他和Countess Euphemia Stewart至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他于1235年登记服兵役。他去世于1248年12月13日之前在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dumbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar was born in 1185, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar, was 33 and his mother, Ada of Scotland, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Countess Euphemia Stewart. He registered for military service in 1235. He died before 13 December 1248, in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, and was buried in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar est né en 1185, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ada of Scotland, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Countess Euphemia Stewart. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1235. Il est décédé avant 13 décembre 1248, à Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, et a été enterré à Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar 1185 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar 33 und seine Mutter Ada of Scotland 21. Er hatte mit Countess Euphemia Stewart mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1235 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb vor 13. Dezember 1248 in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar è nato il nel 1185 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ada of Scotland, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Countess Euphemia Stewart. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1235. Morì prima del 13 dicembre 1248, nel Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, e fu sepolto a Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbarが1185年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbarは33歳，母Ada of Scotlandは21歳であった。彼はCountess Euphemia Stewartとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1235年に兵役登録をした。彼は1248年12月13日以前にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンマーセイルで死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar(이)가 1185년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada of Scotland(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Countess Euphemia Stewart(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1235년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1248년 12월 13일 이전 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 마세이에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar nasceu em 1185, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ada of Scotland, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Countess Euphemia Stewart. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1235. Ele faleceu antes 13 de dezembro de 1248, em Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, e foi sepultado em Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar родился в 1185 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ada of Scotland, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Countess Euphemia Stewart. В 1235 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 13 декабрь 1248 г. в местности марсилл, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция и был похоронен в местности дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar nació en 1185, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ada of Scotland, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Countess Euphemia Stewart. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1235. Murió antes de 13 de diciembre de 1248, en Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, y fue sepultado en Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
